rationale: Both reviews identify the same three scope issues (bundled AffineAlgGroup, vacuous IsUnipotent on wrong type, True-stub placeholders for ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup) with the same block verdict and same fix directions. The True placeholder issue is directly confirmable in the diff; the roadmap-based claims are identically cited by both, so neither review has a material advantage in precision, actionability, or correctness for the scope rubric.
